feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Authorization of Supplier Invoice Operation
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I got a customer request of authorization setting about supplier invoice operation:

Purchaser from purchase department can create supplier invoice, but can not post the invoice. Only users from finance department can post the supplier invoice.

I created a business role Z_BR_AP_ACCOUNTANT (from SAP_BR_AP_ACCOUNTANT). If I assign this role to purchaser, the purchaser will be able to create and post supplier invoice at same time, which is not acceptable.

So how to create business roles or set restrictions to meet this request, thanks.

Best Regards,

Chris

entry.title: Best practice for scope item 5W2 (Group Valuation) when future requirements are uncertain
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I have a question regarding scope item 5W2 – Group Valuation in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

As far as I understand, 5W2 can only be activated as part of the initial scoping and cannot be added later once the implementation has progressed.

We are currently working with a customer who does not require Group Valuation today. However, they cannot completely rule out that this requirement may arise in the future as their group structure and reporting requirements evolve.

In such a situation, what is SAP's recommended approach?

  • Is it considered a best practice to activate 5W2 proactively during the initial scoping phase, even if there is currently no confirmed business requirement?
  • Are there any disadvantages or additional complexities associated with activating 5W2 "just in case"?
  • How does SAP generally advise customers to handle scope items that cannot be activated later but may become relevant in the future?

I would appreciate any guidance, SAP recommendations, or lessons learned from project experience.

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Is a completed Digital Discovery Assessment (DDA) mandatory before starting an PC Project?
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I have a question regarding the role of the Digital Discovery Assessment (DDA) in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition projects.

According to SAP Activate, the DDA is performed during the Discover phase and serves as the basis for defining scope, country versions, integrations, and the overall solution approach.

However, in practice, projects sometimes start with an incomplete or partially validated DDA due to timeline constraints, ongoing business decisions, or evolving requirements.

My questions are:

  • Is a completed and formally finalized DDA considered a mandatory prerequisite before starting an implementation project?
  • Does SAP have an official recommendation regarding projects that start without a fully completed DDA?
  • What are the main risks or implications from SAP's perspective if the implementation begins while parts of the DDA are still open or under discussion?
  • Have other customers or partners successfully started projects with an incomplete DDA, and if so, how was scope governance handled?

I would appreciate any SAP guidance, best practices, or project experiences.

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Recommendation for configuration role based on standard template SAP_BR_BPC_EXPERT
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts, 

We are creating the business roles in an S/4HANA Public Cloud system. We were planning to create a role for access to configure in implementation activities as a copy of the SAP standard business role template SAP_BR_BPC_EXPERT to grant access to all the configuration points. 

The problem we are facing is that the business role template SAP_BR_BPC_EXPERT in our system has almost 300 catalogs, and we get this message when working with the business role:

And then checking the Best Practices for Business Roles | SAP Help Portal in fact SAP is recommending "Not more than 100 business catalogs should be assigned to a business role".

My questions:

  1. Is there any SAP recommendation on how to handle business roles based on the business role template SAP_BR_BPC_EXPERT?
  2. Is there any SAP recommendation on how to set up the security to grant permissions to update the configuration in an S/4HANA Public Cloud system? 

Thanks.

entry.title: CALM: How is the Upgrade Roadmap used in parallel with an Implementation Roadmap?
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

The SAP S/4HANA Cloud Upgrade Roadmap states:

"The roadmap can be used as a standalone mini project for a customer who is already live with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, without ongoing projects. It can also be used in parallel, or have tasks added to an ongoing new implementation or continuous improvement project."

My understanding is therefore that SAP explicitly supports using upgrade activities during an ongoing implementation project.

However, in SAP Cloud ALM, a project appears to be assigned to a single SAP Activate roadmap.

My question is:

How is SAP's recommendation implemented in SAP Cloud ALM when upgrade activities need to be managed in parallel with an ongoing implementation?

For example:

  • Do you create a second SAP Cloud ALM project based on the Upgrade Roadmap?
  • Do you manually add the upgrade tasks to the implementation project?
  • Is there any way to consume both roadmaps within the same project?

I would appreciate any guidance from SAP or implementation partners who have managed Public Cloud projects across mandatory SAP release upgrades.

Thank you.

entry.title: Supplier evaluation by inspection lot
entry.content:
Hello, 

How does the supplier evaluation works via inspection lots, the criterion is grayed out and I cannot modify it 

how its calculated?

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Screen Personas on mobgui for SAP Public Cloud not working on Ivanti Velocity Web Browser
entry.content:
Hi all,

My current customer is using the Ivanti Velocity Web Browser on his Zebra device to run the RF Mobgui in SAP Public Cloud. As some adjustments needed to be done, screen personas was used to make the changes. 

These changes seem to be working fine in any browser when opening the URL, but when the URL is entered in the Velocity Browser the system throws an error "Sorry, the app could not be opened" . Is Ivanti Velocity Web Browser supported for screen personas using Public Cloud? 

 

Thanks for all your help!

entry.title: Are What's New & RASD sufficient for tracking minor asset changes, and tracking ATP screen updates?
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I have a follow-up question regarding a previous discussion about BC Upgrade procedures and tracking development asset changes.

1. Are What’s New Viewer and RASD Sufficient for Daily Operational Impact?

To track the operational impacts on our daily business processes associated with BC Upgrades, I always review the detailed PDF documents attached to SAP Note 3646210. Since these PDFs list even minor bug fixes and asset changes, I find them very informative.

Our primary concern is ensuring there are no operational disruptions when a BC Upgrade occurs. In your experience, is it sufficient to rely solely on the What’s New Viewer and the RASD (Release Assessment and Scope Dependency) tool to verify that there will be no negative impacts on our daily operations? Or do these tools sometimes miss minor behavioral/UI changes, meaning we still need to review the SAP Note PDFs to be completely safe?

2. Specific Example: Where is the ATP Check Selection Screen Change Documented?

As a concrete example, we noticed that the selection screen for the ATP check (for Production Orders / Planned Orders) has changed automatically after HFC12 was applied to the landscape.

We would like to know specifically where this kind of minor update is documented. Is it typically mentioned in the Preliminary What’s New, Product Assistance, or within the RASD tool? Knowing this will help us learn how to locate similar updates ourselves in the future.

Any insights or best practices shared would be greatly appreciated!

Best regards,

Haruki

entry.title: Invoice summery can not be sent to customer via e-mail
entry.content: On output items, when I selected the invoice summery and push the send bottom, the system said that it does not support output channel "00010."

entry.title: Request for Workaround on Intercompany Returns Credit Memo Issue
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support Team,

For Intercompany Returns, we have created the Returns Delivery (LR) and the customer Credit Memo (G2). However, when attempting to generate the Internal Credit Memo (IG), the system reports that no copy control exists between LR and IG.

As per SAP Note 3360228, IG Credit Memos should be created only through the LR2 delivery type. Unfortunately, we have already processed approximately 300 Intercompany Returns using the returns order type CBRE instead of CBAR, as recommended.

Reversing all 300 documents would be highly impractical. We kindly request your guidance on the best possible workaround. Specifically, could manual Credit Memos be created directly in FI, or would it be feasible to configure copy control between LR and IG?

Your support on this matter would be greatly appreciated.

Best regards,

entry.title: S4Hana2608 Upgrade No details of description for Manage Planned Orders under Manufacturing
entry.content: No details of description for Manage Planned Orders under Manufacturing in S4Hana 2608 Upgrade Assessment.

entry.title: Guidance required for correcting PO price after Goods Receipt quantity has been fully consumed
entry.content:
A Purchase Order was created and Goods Receipt was posted successfully. Subsequently, the entire received quantity was consumed through material issue postings, resulting in zero available stock.

It was later identified that the Purchase Order price was incorrect and requires correction. Since the GR quantity has already been fully consumed, we would like to understand the SAP standard process for correcting the PO price in SAP S/4HANA Cloud.

GRN Number : 5000101730PLANT CODE : 5901 (FLORA VYTHIRI RESORT, C.No :13353)

entry.title: "User has no authorization for operation 01 on object BUS3008" when using API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV
entry.content:
We are trying to upload attachments (PDF files) to Vendor (Supplier) master data using the standard SAP OData service: API: API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV Communication Scenario: SAP_COM_0008 but it fails with

"User has no authorization for operation 01 on object BUS3008"

 

Why ?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Incorrect Exchange rates for Calculated costs
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are using make to order scenario (MTO) and when the sales order is created and process order is processed and when we carryout the costing at SO level, the Calculated cost that is shown on the sales order picks up the incorrect exchange rate as compared to the exchange rate on the order (or other condition types). 

Can you help us understand how is this exchange rate picked up on the condition type PC02-Calculated costs.

entry.title: Storage Location not mandatory in PO
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support Team,

Description:
We have a requirement to make Storage Location mandatory in Purchase Orders.
Tried using Field Selection Key (NBF) in document type configuration, but the field remains optional.

Please confirm:

  • Is this possible via standard configuration in S/4HANA Public Cloud?
  • If not, what is the recommended SAP approach?

entry.title: Unable to Remove House Bank Assignment – Error "House Bank is Already in Use
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have the following scenario in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud:

  • House Bank 9983 is currently assigned to three bank accounts.
  • The House Bank ID remains the same (9983), but the House Bank Account IDs are different:
    • House Bank 9983 / Account ID 10
    • House Bank 9983 / Account ID 20
    • House Bank 9983 / Account ID 30

      The business requirement is to maintain separate House Banks for the second and third bank accounts instead of having all three bank accounts under House Bank 9983. Therefore, we created new House Banks and would like to reassign Account IDs 20 and 30 to these new House Banks.

      However, when attempting to remove the existing House Bank 9983 assignment from the second and third bank accounts, the system displays an error indicating that the House Bank/House Bank Account cannot be deleted because it is already in use.

      Is it possible to move these bank accounts to newly created House Banks in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud once the existing House Bank is already in use? If not, is there any alternative or recommended approach to achieve this business requirement?

      Thank you for your guidance.

      Thanks & regards,

      Jatin Mehrani

entry.title: I want to understand how overdraft bank accounts are treated in the general ledger.
entry.content: I am trying to understand how overdraft bank accounts are handled in the general ledger. Specifically, I need to know how these accounts are treated in accounting systems like SAP, their typical setup as liability or clearing accounts, and how the overdraft balances are posted and reconciled within the ledger.

entry.title: SAP Public Cloud Sales - CDS View to retrieve Mode of Transport
entry.content:
Hello everyone, 

I am looking for a CDS-View in the Public Cloud  which connects my Sales Order or the linked Delivery Document (via the route maintained in the Document) to the mode of transport ( e.g. 01 Road, 02 AIR ...) . 

My goal is to retrieve the mode of transport code and use it to connect the Dangerous Goods Text with my order. 

If someone could help me, I would highly appreciate the feedback.

Kind Regards 

Lasse.

entry.title: Intermediary Bank Setup for Customer Payments in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have a requirement where a customer has requested that payments should not be sent directly to their beneficiary bank account. Instead, payments should be routed through an intermediary bank.

Currently:

  • The customer's main bank details are maintained in the Business Partner application.
  • We have maintained the intermediary bank details in the Manage Bank Changes application.
  • For the intermediary bank, we only have the SWIFT/BIC code and do not have an account number.
  • Based on our understanding, we followed the available steps to maintain the intermediary bank information, but we are not certain whether this is the correct and complete approach to meet the requirement.

Could you please advise:

  1. Is maintaining the intermediary bank in the Manage Bank Chains application the correct approach for this requirement in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud?
  2. If this is the correct solution, what are the exact steps and prerequisites required to ensure that payment files and bank transfers successfully route through the intermediary bank?
  3. Is it sufficient to maintain only the SWIFT/BIC code of the intermediary bank, or are there any additional mandatory details required like Account Number and IBAN?
  4. If this is not the recommended approach, is there any alternative standard solution available in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud to support intermediary bank processing for customer payments?
  5. If an alternative solution exists, could you please provide the step-by-step process to implement it?

We would appreciate any guidance or best practices from those who have implemented a similar requirement.

 Thanks & regards,

Jatin Mehrani

entry.title: Journal entries with 0 interest amount are not displayed in "Manage Interest Calculation Runs" app a
entry.content:
[Component / Application]

  • Job: Schedule Interest Calculation Jobs

  • App: Manage Interest Calculation Runs

[Symptom / Actual Behavior] When executing the interest calculation via the "Schedule Interest Calculation Jobs" app, the source journal entry numbers are normally output and can be verified in the "Manage Interest Calculation Runs" app. However, for journal entries where the interest calculation process was executed but the resulting calculated interest amount was "0", they are not output or displayed in the "Manage Interest Calculation Runs" app.

[Questions]

  1. Is it the standard behavior (intended specification) of SAP S/4HANA Cloud that journal entries with a calculated interest amount of 0 are not displayed in the "Manage Interest Calculation Runs" app?

  2. If it is standard behavior, is there any configuration change or parameter setting available to output/display these journal entries with 0 interest amount in the app?
